campaign: MarbMarket — The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
Most DeFi protocols chase yield. MarbMarket chases power.

What if your liquidity position could actually shape the future of a protocol? That's the veDEX model. Users lock MARB tokens, creating veTokens that grant voting power. Longer locks = more influence.

Every week, veMARB holders vote on which LP pools get emissions. Projects can offer bribes to attract those votes. Your liquidity decisions now directly impact protocol incentives.

MARB flywheel: Lockers direct emissions → LPs get rewards → Protocols pay bribes → Incentives flow back to lockers.

First veDEX on MegaETH. No presale. No VCs. Just fair launch.

x.com/Marb_market

@RallyOnChain What's the most creative way you've seen protocols distribute power to users?
qa_comments: This veDEX model is so clever! Giving users real power through veMARB voting changes the DeFi game completely. Love how it creates a positive flywheel where liquidity decisions actually shape protocol incentives.
The bribes concept is genius - protocols now have to compete for user votes rather than just offering random rewards. Finally, DeFi where your liquidity position truly matters beyond just yield!
Fair launch with no VC involvement is exactly what DeFi needs. This veDEX approach could be the next evolution in how protocols distribute power and incentives to their communities.
